name: Anne's Crustless Quiche
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound Cheddar or Monterey Jack cheese - grated
12 oz. jar of quartered & marinated artichokes (reserve marinade)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Combine all ingredients in a bowl.
3. Pour the mixture into an 8 x 8 inch greased pan using reserved marinade.
4. Bake for 40-45 minutes.
5. Allow to cool, then cut into small squares.
6. Reheat at 325°F for 10-12 minutes if desired.
